25 · 07 · 2027 — ORBA, ALICANTE

How on earth did this happen ↓

Two roads, one valley (and a lot of layovers)

Between the two of us we've apparently lived on five continents. Somehow we both landed in Madrid at the same time — and now, against all odds, Orba.
